headline: First Majestic Closes Deal to Sell Its Del Toro Mine to Sierra Madre
summary: AG closes Del Toro mine sale to Sierra Madre in a cash-and-shares deal worth up to $60M, with milestone payments tied to resources and output.

raw.headline: First Majestic Closes Deal to Sell Its Del Toro Mine to Sierra Madre
